question: Is the person doing the act under the age of 7?

yes.name: Act of a child under seven years of age

no.question: Is the person doing the act under the influence of intoxication caused against their will?

yes.name: Act of a person incapable of judgment by reason of intoxication caused against his will

yes.name: Act done by a person bound, or by mistake of fact believing himself bound, by law

no.question: Is the person doing the act acting judicially?

yes.name: Act of Judge when acting judicially

no.question: Is the person doing the act in good faith for the benefit of a person under 12 years of age or of unsound mind?

yes.name: Act done in good faith for benefit of a child or person of unsound mind, by, or by consent of guardian

no.question: Is the person doing the act in good faith for the benefit of a person who has given consent?

yes.name: Act not intended to cause death, done by consent in good faith for person's benefit

no.question: Is the person doing the act likely to cause harm, but done without criminal intent, and to prevent other harm?

yes.name: Act likely to cause harm, but done without criminal intent, and to prevent other harm

no.question: Is the person doing the act an accident in doing a lawful act?

yes.name: Act in doing a lawful act

no.question: Is the person doing the act justified by law?

yes.name: Act done by a person justified, or by mistake of fact believing himself justified, by law

no.question: Is the person doing the act with the knowledge that it is likely to cause harm, but done without any criminal intention to cause harm?

yes.name: Exclusion of acts which are offences independently of harm caused

no.name: Act not intended and not known to be likely to cause death or grievous hurt, done by consent
